frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean pickup with left hand, maintaining tension on object

task_specific_assessments.final_object_positions: All 6 objects successfully transferred to target pegs

confidence_rationale: Clear visualization of all object transfers and timing. All 6 objects visibly moved to correct positions. No dropped objects or fumbling observed. Task completion clearly evident.
technique_summary: Excellent expert-level performance with smooth bilateral coordination and efficient object transfers. Completion time of 42 seconds falls within expert benchmark range.
strengths: Smooth midair transfers without dropping objects
Clean object pickup and placement technique
Excellent completion time within expert range
